item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
item.description: The Supreme Court refused to hear President Donald Trump’s attempt to overturn a jury's finding that he sexually assaulted and defamed writer E. Jean Carroll.

media:content.media:text: Image: TOPSHOT-US-POLITICS-JUSTICE-TRIAL-TRUMP
media:content.media:description: E. Jean Carroll arrives at Manhattan federal court for the second defamation trial against former President Donald Trump, in Manhattan, on Jan. 17, 2024.

item.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump push to overturn E. Jean Carroll assault and defamation verdict

item.description: In Venezuela, round-the-clock rescue missions are racing against time as more than 1,400 people remain unaccounted for following the powerful twin earthquakes that hit near the country’s capital five days ago. It comes as the death toll nears 1,500 and a massive global humanitarian mission takes shape. Telemundo’s Julio Vaqueiro reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: Venezuela Quakes: Race for Survivors as Death Toll Hits 1,450
media:content.media:description: In Venezuela, round-the-clock rescue missions are racing against time as more than 1,400 people remain unaccounted for following the powerful twin earthquakes that hit near the country’s capital five days ago. It comes as the death toll nears 1,500 and a massive global humanitarian mission takes shape. Telemundo’s Julio Vaqueiro reports for TODAY.

item.title: Venezuela Quakes: Race for Survivors as Death Toll Hits 1,450

item.description: Comcast said it plans to spin off the NBCUniversal media empire into a separate publicly traded company, separating it from the corporation’s broadcast and wireless businesses. NBC News' Brian Cheung has the latest details surrounding the planned spinoffs.

media:content.media:title: Comcast to spin off NBCUniversal into a separate company
media:content.media:description: Comcast said it plans to spin off the NBCUniversal media empire into a separate publicly traded company, separating it from the corporation’s broadcast and wireless businesses. NBC News' Brian Cheung has the latest details surrounding the planned spinoffs.

item.title: Comcast to spin off NBCUniversal into a separate company

item.description: The United States and Iran appear to have paused hostilities following a weekend of escalating attacks that rocked the Middle East, less than a week after Vice President JD Vance announced both sides had set a foundation for a lasting peace deal. Now, a new round of peace talks appears to be on the table as the war enters its fifth month. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

media:content.media:title: US and Iran Pause Hostilities After Weekend of Escalating Strikes
media:content.media:description: The United States and Iran appear to have paused hostilities following a weekend of escalating attacks that rocked the Middle East, less than a week after Vice President JD Vance announced both sides had set a foundation for a lasting peace deal. Now, a new round of peace talks appears to be on the table as the war enters its fifth month. NBC’s Keir Simmons reports for TODAY.

item.title: US and Iran Pause Hostilities After Weekend of Escalating Strikes

item.dc:creator: Corky Siemaszko
item.description: The American flag can have many meanings, whether hung on front porches or waved in parades and protests. To some, it’s also tied up with President Trump.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Bruce Watson sits on the front steps to his house, his dog lays on the path in front of him, and an American flag flies in front of the house
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: A silhouette of the side profile of Dina Bannick at sunset outside
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: A three-way split composite image of left, a face close up of a large wood carving statue of Donald Trump, center, David Cavannah sitting on top of a large log near other logs, and right, a wide view of a large wood carving statue of Donald Trump holding a sign that says "MAGA" with an American flag flying on a pole behind it
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Frank Chappell stands outside holding a blue flag with an insignia showing two horses, an eagle, and a ship in the center crest, text on the bottom on a red ribbon design reads "virtue, liberty, and indepence"
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Rebecca Dyer, stands in front of her home with a hand on her pregnant belly, an American flag can be seen flying in front of the house
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: From left, Rebecca Dyer watches her two sons blowing bubble in their backyard outside
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Bruce Watson stands in front of an American flag
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

media:content.media:text: Close up of two rows of red white and blue stars and tassles hanging from threads
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

item.title: As nation turns 250, many Americans say the Stars and Stripes is now a red flag

item.dc:creator: Jared Perlo
item.description: A new survey from the AI Policy Institute finds bipartisan support for legislation that targets powerful AI systems.

media:content.media:text: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and President Donald Trump.
media:content.media:description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and President Donald Trump in Evian-les-Bains, France, on June 17.

item.title: Voters of both parties want tighter AI regulation, poll finds

item.description: El defensa habló previo al duelo ante Japón en 16vos, aseguró que Brasil no se confía pese a ser favorito; destacó las fortalezas del grupo, el gran trabajo de Ancelotti y las diferencias que hacen a la "Verdeamarela" más fuerte que en ediciones pasadas.

media:content.media:title: Marquinhos no se confía: "Incluso los equipos más humildes pueden dar la sorpresa en el Mundial"
media:content.media:description: El defensa habló previo al duelo ante Japón en 16vos, aseguró que Brasil no se confía pese a ser favorito; destacó las fortalezas del grupo, el gran trabajo de Ancelotti y las diferencias que hacen a la "Verdeamarela" más fuerte que en ediciones pasadas.

item.title: Marquinhos no se confía: "Incluso los equipos más humildes pueden dar la sorpresa en el Mundial"

item.description: Carlo Ancelotti se solidarizó con el pueblo venezolano y aseguró que Brasil está preparado, motivado y enfocado en Japón. El DT destacó el regreso de Neymar, la experiencia del equipo y advirtió que no ve un favorito claro en el Mundial.

media:content.media:title: Ancelotti: “Nos preparamos como si fuera una final”
media:content.media:description: Carlo Ancelotti se solidarizó con el pueblo venezolano y aseguró que Brasil está preparado, motivado y enfocado en Japón. El DT destacó el regreso de Neymar, la experiencia del equipo y advirtió que no ve un favorito claro en el Mundial.

item.title: Ancelotti: “Nos preparamos como si fuera una final”

item.description: En la rueda de prensa previa al partido de dieciseisavos entre Países Bajos y Marruecos, el Koeman y Van Dijk demostraron su confianza y aseguraron que van a disfrutar mucho jugar en Monterrey, donde esperan tener un gran apoyo de la gente.

media:content.media:title: Ronald Koeman y Virgil van Dijk confían en que Países Bajos puede vencer a Marruecos
media:content.media:description: En la rueda de prensa previa al partido de dieciseisavos entre Países Bajos y Marruecos, el Koeman y Van Dijk demostraron su confianza y aseguraron que van a disfrutar mucho jugar en Monterrey, donde esperan tener un gran apoyo de la gente.

item.title: Ronald Koeman y Virgil van Dijk confían en que Países Bajos puede vencer a Marruecos

item.description: Jugadores de la selección de Canadá no pudieron ocultar la emoción de lograr el pase a octavos de final de una manera por demás dramática

media:content.media:title: Stephen Eustáquio desvela la sensación de marcar de último momento
media:content.media:description: Jugadores de la selección de Canadá no pudieron ocultar la emoción de lograr el pase a octavos de final de una manera por demás dramática

item.title: Stephen Eustáquio desvela la sensación de marcar de último momento

item.description: Stephen Eustaquio marcó al minuto 91 el gol que le dio a Canadá la victoria sobre Sudáfrica y su primera clasificación a los octavos de final de una Copa del Mundo. La fase de eliminación directa comenzó con un final dramático.

media:content.media:title: Un gol en el descuento mete a Canadá entre los 16 mejores del Mundial
media:content.media:description: Stephen Eustaquio marcó al minuto 91 el gol que le dio a Canadá la victoria sobre Sudáfrica y su primera clasificación a los octavos de final de una Copa del Mundo. La fase de eliminación directa comenzó con un final dramático.

item.title: Un gol en el descuento mete a Canadá entre los 16 mejores del Mundial

item.description: Jesse Marsch y Stephen Eustáquio reconocieron la fortaleza y pundonor del seleccionado sudafricano y la motivación de clasificar a octavos de final.

media:content.media:title: Los grandes contrastes entre vencedores y vencidos en Voces del Mundial
media:content.media:description: Jesse Marsch y Stephen Eustáquio reconocieron la fortaleza y pundonor del seleccionado sudafricano y la motivación de clasificar a octavos de final.

item.title: Los grandes contrastes entre vencedores y vencidos en Voces del Mundial

item.description: El país de la ‘Hoja de Maple’ nunca había llegado tan lejos en una Copa del Mundo hasta este 2026, en donde un gol inolvidable de Stephen Eustáquio fue suficiente para vencer a Sudáfrica y poner a su país en la ronda de octavos de final

media:content.media:title: Canadá protagoniza Lo Mejor del Día en el Mundial con su histórica clasificación
media:content.media:description: El país de la ‘Hoja de Maple’ nunca había llegado tan lejos en una Copa del Mundo hasta este 2026, en donde un gol inolvidable de Stephen Eustáquio fue suficiente para vencer a Sudáfrica y poner a su país en la ronda de octavos de final

item.title: Canadá protagoniza Lo Mejor del Día en el Mundial con su histórica clasificación

item.description: Sudafricanos y canadienses llegaron llenos de ilusión al partido de dieciseisavos, con ambas naciones buscando una clasificación histórica que, al final, solo pudieron celebrar unos cuantos. El color y la celebración en el estadio fue inigualable.

media:content.media:title: Canadá avanzó a octavos del Mundial por primera vez y así lo celebró su gente
media:content.media:description: Sudafricanos y canadienses llegaron llenos de ilusión al partido de dieciseisavos, con ambas naciones buscando una clasificación histórica que, al final, solo pudieron celebrar unos cuantos. El color y la celebración en el estadio fue inigualable.

item.title: Canadá avanzó a octavos del Mundial por primera vez y así lo celebró su gente

item.description: Andrés Guardado y Carlos Salcido vivieron en primera fila la victoria de Canadá sobre Sudáfrica. Un partido histórico para los canadienses, en donde nuestros expertos coinciden en que fueron superiores a su rival y eso se pudo reflejar en el marcador.

media:content.media:title: ¿Fue justa la clasificación de Canadá a octavos? Nuestros expertos lo analizan
media:content.media:description: Andrés Guardado y Carlos Salcido vivieron en primera fila la victoria de Canadá sobre Sudáfrica. Un partido histórico para los canadienses, en donde nuestros expertos coinciden en que fueron superiores a su rival y eso se pudo reflejar en el marcador.

item.title: ¿Fue justa la clasificación de Canadá a octavos? Nuestros expertos lo analizan

item.description: El entrenador de Canadá dijo al cierre del juego con Sudáfrica, que la clasificación en el Mundial convirtió a sus jugadores en héroes nacionales y confesó que viajará de inmediato a ver el partido de sus posibles rivales.

media:content.media:title: Con la voz entrecortada, Jesse Marsch dice que sus jugadores son héroes canadienses
media:content.media:description: El entrenador de Canadá dijo al cierre del juego con Sudáfrica, que la clasificación en el Mundial convirtió a sus jugadores en héroes nacionales y confesó que viajará de inmediato a ver el partido de sus posibles rivales.

item.title: Con la voz entrecortada, Jesse Marsch dice que sus jugadores son héroes canadienses

item.description: Nearly half the country is on alert for dangerous oppressive temperatures with record highs expected. In the West the hot, dry weather is fueling deadly wildfires, while parts of the South are drying out after catastrophic flash flooding where at least four people died. NBC’s Shaquille Brewster reports and TODAY’s Al Roker tracks the forecast.

media:content.media:title: Deadly Floods, Wildfires and Heat Wave Batter the US
media:content.media:description: Nearly half the country is on alert for dangerous oppressive temperatures with record highs expected. In the West the hot, dry weather is fueling deadly wildfires, while parts of the South are drying out after catastrophic flash flooding where at least four people died. NBC’s Shaquille Brewster reports and TODAY’s Al Roker tracks the forecast.

item.title: Deadly Floods, Wildfires and Heat Wave Batter the US

item.description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

media:content.media:title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft
media:content.media:description: Fresh off the NBA Finals, teams are preparing for the 2026 draft where fresh talent will get to shine. NBC News' Marquis Francis reports on what to expect and how the Giannis Antetokounmpo trade is shaking up the league.

item.title: Game on: NBA prepares for 2026 draft

item.dc:creator: Lawrence Hurley
item.description: The Supreme Court refused to hear President Donald Trump’s attempt to overturn a jury's finding that he sexually assaulted and defamed writer E. Jean Carroll.

media:content.media:text: Image: TOPSHOT-US-POLITICS-JUSTICE-TRIAL-TRUMP
media:content.media:description: E. Jean Carroll arrives at Manhattan federal court for the second defamation trial against former President Donald Trump, in Manhattan, on Jan. 17, 2024.

item.title: Supreme Court rejects Trump push to overturn E. Jean Carroll assault and defamation verdict

item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
item.description: MANCHESTER, England — Andy Burnham, likely the next U.K. prime minister, pledged Monday to give away a chunk of his power by handing greater autonomy to local leaders in a “circuit-breaker” for the sclerotic British state

media:content.media:text: Andy Burnham Delivers Speech On The Economy
media:content.media:description: Andy Burnham speaking in Manchester, England on Monday.

item.title: Andy Burnham says he’ll transform the U.K. economy by giving local leaders greater autonomy

item.dc:creator: Elmira Aliieva
item.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin acknowledged for the first time Sunday that Russia is facing fuel shortages following a wave of Ukrainian attacks deep inside the country.

media:content.media:text: Image: Vladimir Putin on stage addressing an audience
media:content.media:description: Russia's Vladimir Putin addresses the audience at the 23rd Congress of the United Russia party in Moscow on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: Oil refinery in Moscow hit by large-scale Ukrainian drone attack, mayor says
media:content.media:description: Russia's Vladimir Putin addresses the audience at the 23rd Congress of the United Russia party in Moscow on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: Fuel shortages in Crimea amid Russia-Ukraine conflict
media:content.media:description: Russia's Vladimir Putin addresses the audience at the 23rd Congress of the United Russia party in Moscow on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: Burning Storage Tanks and Heavy Smoke in Kerch - June 20, 2026
media:content.media:description: Russia's Vladimir Putin addresses the audience at the 23rd Congress of the United Russia party in Moscow on Sunday.

item.title: Putin admits fuel shortages after Ukrainian attacks

item.dc:creator: Keir Simmons
Alexander Smith
item.description: JERUSALEM — The United States and Iran will hold new talks on Tuesday in Qatar, President Donald Trump said Monday, after the two sides appeared to step back from a wave of attacks that threatened to derail peace efforts.“IRAN HAS REQUESTED A MEETING.

media:content.media:credit: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corp via Reuters
media:content.media:text: Iran's IRGC releases video said to show missile, drone strikes targeting U.S. military sites in Kuwait and Bahrain (Posted 28th June)
media:content.media:description: Iran's IRGC releases video said to show missile, drone strikes targeting U.S. military sites in Kuwait and Bahrain (Posted 28th June)

item.title: U.S. and Iran set for new talks, Trump says, after Hormuz clashes threatened peace deal

item.dc:creator: Daniel Arkin
Alexander Smith
item.description: Comcast said Monday that it plans to spin off NBCUniversal into a separate publicly traded company, the latest shift in an industry grappling with rapid technological change and new consumer habits

media:content.media:text: Rockefeller Center in New York City
media:content.media:description: People visit the Top of the Rock observation deck behind a Comcast corporate logo at the top of 30 Rock in Rockefeller Center seen from the Empire State Building on May 8, 2023, in New York City.

item.title: Comcast to spin off NBCUniversal and Sky into separate company

item.dc:creator: Corky Siemaszko
item.description: The American flag can have many meanings, whether hung on front porches or waved in parades and protests. To some, it’s also tied up with President Trump.

media:content.media:text: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.
media:content.media:description: Americans of all stripes put their flags, and sometimes their discontent, on display as the U.S. marks its 250th birthday.

item.dc:creator: Elmira Aliieva
item.description: Hopes were fading Monday that survivors might still be found from the powerful twin earthquakes that rocked Venezuela, even as more international teams arrived to boost desperate search efforts

media:content.media:text: APTOPIX Venezuela Earthquake
media:content.media:description: Rescue workers carry a man rescued from the rubble of a building that collapsed in the earthquakes that struck La Guaira, Venezuela, Sunday, June 28, 2026.

media:content.media:text: Death Toll Increases In Venezuela Three Days After A Double Earthquake Struck The Country
media:content.media:description: Teams search amid debris of a demolished building in La Guaira, Venezuela, on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: Death Toll Increases In Venezuela Three Days After A Double Earthquake Struck The Country
media:content.media:description: People look at a wall with the photos of missing people at Parque Ali Primera on Saturday.

media:content.media:text: TOPSHOT-VENEZUELA-EARTHQUAKE
media:content.media:description: Rescuers and volunteers rest on the rubble of collapsed buildings in Caraballeda, La Guaira state, on Sunday.

media:content.media:text: Death Toll Increases In Venezuela Three Days After A Double Earthquake Struck The Country
media:content.media:description: A demolished building at Caraballeda in La Guaira, on Saturday.

item.title: Frustration and fading hopes in Venezuela with thousands still missing after twin quakes
